token_family_docs.$description: UI Scale mode — per-component size variation (sm / md / lg). Each value holds the CSS class string the application adds to a container to activate that component size. md is the base.

selector.$description: Developer-facing class. The application adds it to a container to activate the small component size.
md is the base ui_scale mode — no class is applied. It is the first-paint default.
Developer-facing class. The application adds it to a container to activate the large component size.
